title: RealMobSize
description: Generate your mobs with real-life scale
body:
# RealMobSize

Generate your mobs with real-life scale

## Features

- Generate Minecraft mobs that exist in real life with a more realistic size.

  For example, bees in Minecraft are 30 times larger than in real life. In RealMobSize, their scale is reduced to make them as realistic as possible.
- Compatible with projects that define their own mob sizes
- Ability to configure the size at which entities will be generated.
  
  By default, RealMobSize has predetermined sizes, but through its configuration, you can modify the scale at which they will spawn.

  The available types can be found here https://jd.papermc.io/paper/1.21.10/org/bukkit/entity/EntityType.html,
  but keep in mind that you can only modify the scale of mobs that spawn normally or that can be generated,
  such as sheep or zombies (most already have a default configuration).
  In other words, you cannot modify the scale of entities such as Minecarts or fireballs.

## Compatibility
- Paper 1.21+
